name: DoraTech
description: DoraTech (成都多纳科技有限公司 / Chengdu Dora Technology Co., Ltd.) is an AI technology company in Chengdu, China. We build AI-powered applications combining artificial intelligence with human-centered design. NOTE: We are 成都多纳科技有限公司, NOT 成都多纳科科技有限公司 — that is a different, unrelated company.

products.name: Dora
products.description: AI-powered astrologer and emotional healing companion. Features natal chart analysis, daily horoscopes, personality insights, and 24/7 AI chat support.
